roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC1473,7 MOTION TO VACATE CONVICTION FILED

/CAL: MOTION TO VACATE PURSUANT TO PC1473,7; DA NON-OPP TO SET ASIDE/NP/X:THE PEOPLE DO NOT OPPOSE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTY PLEA,ENTER A NOT GUILTY PLEA AND SET ASIDE THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE OF MARCH1, 1993/MO GRTD/X: PLEA DATE:01-26-1993/X: SENTENCE DATE:03-01-1993/ /X: THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY ADVISED OF THE POTENTIAL CONSEQUENCES OF A GUILTY PLEA, /CTORD: THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE WERE ILLEGALAND INVALID,  PREJUDICIAL ERROR DAMAGED THE DEFENDANT,  ACCORDINGLY, THE GUILTY PLEA ENTERED ON 01-26-1993 IS SET ASIDE A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED,THE SENTENCE ENTERED ON 03-01-1993 ARE HEREBY VACATED, /X: THERE BEING NONEW PLEA ENTERED, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER DISMISSED/MO PC 1385: INTEREST OF JUSTICE/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/

/CAL:DEFENDANT'S PC 17(B) & PC 1203,4 MOTION/MO GRTD/X: THE COURT GRANTSMOTION FOR MISDEMEANOR REDUCTION PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) AS TO COUNT 1, 245(A)1PC,/CTORD: CHARGE (S) REDUCED FROM A FELONY TO A MISDEMEANOR/X: MOTION PURSUANT TO PC 1203,4 IS GRANTED,/X: PURSUANT TO SIGNED AND FILED ORDER: GUILTY PLEA IS SET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED,/X: ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/

/CAL:DEFENDANT'S PC 1203,4 AND PC 17(B) PETITION/SUPP:09-21-17/CTORD: SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT TO PROVIDE RESTITUTION STATUS AND INCLUDE THE ORIGINAL POLICE INCIDENT REPORT/CONTD:DEF PC 1203,4 AND PC 17(B) MOTION; APD SUPPLEMENTAL RPT/S18/
SPN INT WVD BY DEFT;A/JWV;ISS3YPROB;6MCJ;CTS29D;NOCP/ER/HD/WF;WS;$200RFREST&10%FEE;POSS NO WPNS;$150PSR;$40PC;ACCEPTS PROB;REMANDEDIF DEPORTED DO NOT RE ENTER USA ILLEGALLY
